channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Daughters of the American Revolution Vote to Allow Transgender Women
Rep. Kustoff Tells Newsmax Constituents Are Worried About Elections
item.description: Rep. David Kustoff, R-Tenn., said Tuesday that his constituents have concerns about election security in the United States.

item.title: Hawley Launches Investigation Into Postal Service Over Dumped Mail and Bonuses
item.description: Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., demands USPS records on dumped mail in St. Louis, executive bonuses, and potential criminal wrongdoing in a new probe.

item.title: Congress Sees Rare Bipartisan Housing Win With or Without Trump's Support
item.description: Donald Trump called the bipartisan housing bill a "yawn" compared to the SAVE America Act, refusing to sign it during his midterm push.
